title: Mod Manifest
description: Schema for mod.json (mod-level metadata). This is separate from scenario metadata.

displayName.description: Display name shown in mod browser

iconPath.description: Relative path to a mod icon image (required if specified in code/UI). When declared, this path is used exclusively — no implicit fallbacks to root icon.png or other defaults.

thumbnailPath.description: Relative path to a larger mod thumbnail/preview image (required if specified in code/UI). When declared, this path is used exclusively — no implicit fallbacks.

startYear.description: Optional suggested start year for UI metadata

workshopItemId.description: Steam Workshop item id when applicable

defaultScenarioFile.description: Relative path to single-file scenario json

scenarioFolder.description: Relative path to split scenario folder; takes precedence over defaultScenarioFile

entrypoints.description: Optional explicit entrypoint declarations for runtime assets.

wasm.description: Relative path to mod WASM entrypoint. Loader checks this first, then falls back to scripts/main.wasm for legacy mods.

ui.description: Relative path to UI injection descriptor. Loader checks this first, then falls back to ui/panels.json for legacy mods.

enableComponentRuntime.description: Explicit opt-in to allow loading component-model WASM artifacts for this mod. Keep false unless the mod ships component-model binaries and the game runtime has a component backend enabled.

runtimePolicy.description: Declares how this mod's runtime components coexist. coexist=WASM and C# run together (default). wasm_only=refuse to subscribe if C# hooks already registered. csharp_only=skip WASM loading for this mod.
